info.name: 03 - Leave Management (Complete)
info.description: Complete leave management including leave types, requests, allocations, balances, and file attachments. Features pending request tracking, transaction-based approvals, and notifications.

request.description: Get all active leave types. No special permission required.

response.name: Success - Leave Types
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Leave types retrieved successfully",
  "data": {

      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Get single leave type details

response.name: Success - Leave Type Details
Error - Not Found

request.description: Create new leave type. Requires leave:request permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Created
Error - Name Exists

request.description: Update leave type. Requires leave:approve permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Updated

request.description: Deactivate leave type (soft delete). Requires leave:approve permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Type Deleted

request.description: Get current user's leave requests. No special permission required.

response.name: Success - My Leave Requests

request.description: Get single leave request details. Owner or admin only.

request.description: Get current user's leave balances. Shows allocated, used, pending, and remaining days.

request.description: Get leave history from leave_history table

response.name: Success - Leave History

request.description: Submit new leave request. Requires leave:create permission. Backend validates balance including pending requests.

response.name: Success - Leave Request Submitted
Error - Insufficient Balance
Error - No Allocation
Error - Past Date

request.description: Approve leave request. Requires leave:update permission. Transaction-based: updates request + allocation + sends notification.

response.name: Success - Leave Approved
Error - Not Found

request.description: Reject leave request. Requires leave:update permission. Sends rejection notification.

response.name: Success - Leave Rejected

request.description: Cancel own leave request. Refunds days if already approved. Requires leave:delete permission.

response.name: Success - Leave Cancelled
Error - Cannot Cancel

request.description: Upload supporting documents for leave request. Max 5 files, 5MB each. Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX.

response.name: Success - Files Uploaded
Error - File Too Large
Error - Invalid File Type
Error - Too Many Files

request.description: Get attachments for a leave request

response.name: Success - Files Retrieved

request.description: Delete a file by index (0-based). Only allowed for submitted/pending requests.

response.name: Success - File Deleted
Error - Cannot Delete

request.description: Download/view uploaded file. No authentication required for viewing.

response.name: Success - File Content
response.body: (Binary file content - PDF/Image/Document)

response.name: Error - File Not Found

request.description: Get current user's leave allocations

response.name: Success - My Allocations

request.description: Get single allocation details

response.name: Success - Allocation Details

request.description: Allocate leave days to a single user. Requires leave_allocation:create permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Created
Error - Duplicate Allocation

request.description: Allocate leave to multiple selected users at once

response.name: Success - Bulk Allocation Created

request.description: Allocate leave to ALL active users in the system. Use with caution!

response.name: Success - Allocate All

request.description: Update allocation details. Requires leave_allocation:update permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Updated

request.description: Delete allocation. Requires leave_allocation:delete permission.

response.name: Success - Allocation Deleted
